# Elysia - Ergonomic Framework for Humans

> Ergonomic Framework for Humans

Ergonomic Framework for Humans. TypeScript framework supercharged by Bun with End - to - End Type Safety, unified type system and outstanding developer experience

## Table of Contents

### Getting Started

- [At glance - ElysiaJS](https://elysiajs.com/at-glance.md)
- [Quick Start - ElysiaJS](https://elysiajs.com/quick-start.md)
- [Key Concept - ElysiaJS](https://elysiajs.com/key-concept.md)

### Essential

- [Route - ElysiaJS](https://elysiajs.com/essential/route.md)
- [Handler - ElysiaJS](https://elysiajs.com/essential/handler.md)
- [Plugin - ElysiaJS](https://elysiajs.com/essential/plugin.md)
- [Lifecycle - ElysiaJS](https://elysiajs.com/essential/life-cycle.md)
- [Validation - ElysiaJS](https://elysiajs.com/essential/validation.md)
- [Best Practice - ElysiaJS](https://elysiajs.com/essential/best-practice.md)

---

# Better Auth

> The most comprehensive authentication framework for TypeScript

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/introduction.md)
- [Installation](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/installation.md)
- [Basic Usage](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/basic-usage.md)

## Concepts

- [API](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/concepts/api.md)
- [CLI](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/concepts/cli.md)
- [Client](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/concepts/client.md)
- [Cookies](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/concepts/cookies.md)
- [Database](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/concepts/database.md)
- [Dynamic Base URL](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/concepts/dynamic-base-url.md)
- [Email](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/concepts/email.md)
- [Hooks](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/concepts/hooks.md)
- [OAuth](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/concepts/oauth.md)
- [Plugins](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/concepts/plugins.md)
- [Rate Limit](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/concepts/rate-limit.md)
- [Session Management](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/concepts/session-management.md)
- [TypeScript](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/concepts/typescript.md)
- [User & Accounts](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/concepts/users-accounts.md)

## Integrations

- [Elysia Integration](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/integrations/elysia.md)
- [Astro Integration](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/integrations/astro.md)
- [Convex Integration](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/integrations/convex.md)
- [Electron Integration](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/integrations/electron.md)
- [Expo Integration](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/integrations/expo.md)
- [Express Integration](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/integrations/express.md)
- [Fastify Integration](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/integrations/fastify.md)
- [Hono Integration](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/integrations/hono.md)
- [NestJS Integration](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/integrations/nestjs.md)
- [Next.js Integration](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/integrations/next.md)
- [Nuxt Integration](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/integrations/nuxt.md)
- [React Router v7 Integration](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/integrations/react-router.md)
- [SvelteKit Integration](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/integrations/svelte-kit.md)
- [TanStack Start Integration](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/integrations/tanstack.md)

- [SQLite](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/adapters/sqlite.md)
- [PostgreSQL](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/adapters/postgresql.md)
- [MySQL](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/adapters/mysql.md)
- [MS SQL](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/adapters/mssql.md)
- [MongoDB Adapter](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/adapters/mongo.md)
- [Drizzle ORM Adapter](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/adapters/drizzle.md)
- [Prisma](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/adapters/prisma.md)
- [Other Relational Databases](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/adapters/other-relational-databases.md)
- [Community Adapters](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/adapters/community-adapters.md)

- [Email & Password](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/authentication/email-password.md)

- [Spotify](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/authentication/spotify.md)
- [Twitch](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/authentication/twitch.md)
- [Twitter (X)](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/authentication/twitter.md)

- [Phone Number](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/plugins/phone-number.md)

- [Stripe](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/plugins/stripe.md)
- [Username](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/plugins/username.md)
- [Community Plugins](https://www.better-auth.com/docs/plugins/community-plugins.md)
